creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
With PIM disabled KDE 5.12 doesn't pull akonadi (and mysql-server). Now it pulls through x11/kf5-frameworks -> kf5-purpose -> kaccounts-integration -> akonadi
Bare akonadi is unoperational and running mysql-server locally is a little bit stupid from my point of view.

Can we move kf5-purpose to PIM group?
